chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الْجَبْرِ وَ الْقَدَرِ وَ الْأَمْرِ بَيْنَ الْأَمْرَيْنِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 30 – The Compulsion, and the Pre-determination, and the matter is between the two matters

text: ا إِنَّ اللَّهَ أَرْحَمُ بِخَلْقِهِ مِنْ أَنْ يُجْبِرَ خَلْقَهُ عَلَى الذُّنُوبِ ثُمَّ يُعَذِّبَهُمْ عَلَيْهَا وَ اللَّهُ أَعَزُّ مِنْ أَنْ يُرِيدَ أَمْراً فَلَا يَكُونَ
قَالَ فَسُئِلَا ( عليهما السلام ) هَلْ بَيْنَ الْجَبْرِ وَ الْقَدَرِ مَنْزِلَةٌ ثَالِثَةٌ قَالَا نَعَمْ أَوْسَعُ مِمَّا بَيْنَ السَّمَاءِ وَ الْأَرْضِ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from Muhammad Bin Isa, from Yunus Bin Abdul Rahman, from someone else,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> and Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> both having said: ‘Allah<sup>azwj</sup> is more Merciful with His<sup>azwj</sup> creatures than Compelling His<sup>azwj</sup> creatures upon the sins, then He<sup>azwj</sup> Punishes them upon these; and Allah is Mightier than for Him<sup>azwj</sup> to Intend a matter, so it does not come into being’.

He (the narrator) said, ‘So they<sup>asws</sup> were both asked, ‘Is there a third status between the Compulsion and the Pre-determination?’ They<sup>asws</sup> both said: ‘Yes, more extensive than what is between the sky and the earth’.
